repo_identity.name: PersonalSite
repo_identity.purpose: Adrian Lumley's public editorial, work, writing, lab, Signal Room, and contact surface

basis: content schemas and shared query helpers
provenance.maintenance_rule: Update this contract and docs/architecture.html together when architecture-relevant source changes, then refresh source_fingerprint.digest.

architecture.purpose: Build and verify a premium editorial personal site as static output while preserving a small set of runtime integrations and compatibility routes.
architecture.style: Astro pages compose shared layouts and components; typed content collections feed shared query helpers; build-time endpoints generate feeds, sitemaps, and social images.
stack: Tailwind CSS 3 plus global CSS tokens
Astro Content Collections with Zod schemas
Satori and Sharp for generated Open Graph images
source_scope: content schemas, queries, and path helpers

source_fingerprint.algorithm_description: Expand include patterns to regular files, remove excluded matches, deduplicate and sort by UTF-8 repo-relative POSIX path, then SHA-256 each frame: path bytes, NUL, decimal byte length, NUL, raw file bytes, NUL.

components.name: route layer
components.responsibility: Map Astro files to public pages, compatibility redirects, RSS, sitemap, and generated image endpoints.

components.name: base document shell
components.responsibility: Own the HTML document, metadata defaults, structured data, accessibility entry points, global styles, shared header, main slot, footer, and delight layer.

components.name: navigation shell
components.responsibility: Render the canonical desktop, mobile, and footer navigation from one ordered data source.

components.name: content collections
components.responsibility: Validate writing and Signal Room frontmatter while keeping their content bodies in repo-owned Markdown.

components.name: content query layer
components.responsibility: Centralize publication filtering, ordering, canonical route forms, Open Graph paths, and display formatting.

components.name: SEO and syndication
components.responsibility: Produce canonical metadata, structured data, RSS, and sitemap output from shared site and content data.

components.name: Open Graph image generation
components.responsibility: Render 1200 by 630 social cards at build time with local typography through Satori and Sharp.

components.name: static lab artifacts
components.responsibility: Serve self-contained experiments directly as static assets outside Astro page composition.

components.name: Rogue status integration
components.responsibility: Fetch a public, server-stamped heartbeat summary and render only freshness claims that can be verified client-side.

components.name: contribution gate
components.responsibility: Fail closed on contribution-contract, architecture, path, command-safety, and verification errors before trusted commands execute.

components.name: deployment pipeline
components.responsibility: Build the Astro site and publish the generated artifact from main to GitHub Pages.

runtime_boundaries.name: contact submission
runtime_boundaries.failure_mode: form submission fails without affecting static pages

runtime_boundaries.name: analytics
runtime_boundaries.failure_mode: analytics failure does not block rendering

runtime_boundaries.name: Rogue public status
runtime_boundaries.failure_mode: UI keeps a non-freshness fallback and makes no false live claim

data_flows.to: static HTML, CSS, and client scripts in dist/
writing index, entry pages, feed items, and social cards
episode index, entry pages, feed items, and social cards
live, quiet, or unknown status presentation
audit result or bounded trusted verification commands

development: Python 3 standard library for the contribution gate
dependencies.dependency_policy: Contribution-only architecture work does not mutate manifests or install dependencies.

invariants: The canonical public navigation order is work, lab, writing, signal room, contact.
The adrian lumley wordmark does not wrap and mobile navigation remains a hamburger or toggle.
Old /blog/ URLs continue to redirect or alias to writing.
Base.astro remains the shared document shell for primary Astro pages.
Writing publication state and ordering flow through getPublishedPosts; Signal Room ordering flows through getEpisodes.
Post and episode route forms in src/lib/content.ts remain stable because they are used as RSS identifiers.
The public surface follows the lowercase editorial and protected-language rules in AGENTS.md.
Architecture artifacts use only repo-relative paths and the human map has no external asset dependencies.
Architecture validation runs during contribution audit and before verify executes trusted commands.

protected_boundaries.contribution_exception: Repo-owned contribution tests under src/agent/ are the documented narrow exception; architecture-specific tests live under .agent/ to avoid changing protected application source.
rules: Do not change public source, content, visuals, dependencies, lockfiles, workflows, deployment configuration, authentication, services, or live state for contribution-only work.
Do not read or print secrets; portable artifacts contain no credentials, identifiers for private coordination, or machine-specific paths.
Treat verify as defense in depth around trusted repo-owned commands, not as a sandbox.
Escalate rather than infer behavior when a public, source, deployment, or data boundary is ambiguous.

escalation_conditions: Existing instructions conflict materially and resolving them would change public site behavior.
Correct work requires modifying a protected public-site path outside the explicit task scope.
Verification requires dependency installation, secrets, external coordination, or live-state access.
A source, runtime integration, data contract, or deployment boundary cannot be verified from repo-owned evidence.
A proposed action would push, deploy, open a pull request, or otherwise leave the worktree boundary without authorization.
